# OnePanel Reader

> OnePanel Reader is a web app that reveals a manga chapter one panel at a
> time, so readers never see the next panel or page before they are ready
> for it.

OnePanel Reader solves accidental spoilers caused by full-page manga scans:
on a normal page, the next panel or reveal is often visible in your
peripheral vision before you mean to read it. OnePanel takes a chapter link
and turns it into a focused, panel-by-panel reading flow with left/right
arrow-key navigation.

## Key facts

- OnePanel Reader works with chapter links from https://opchapters.com/.
- Pricing: OnePanel Pro is EUR 4.99 per month, no free trial, cancel any
  time. Billing is handled by Stripe.
- Sign in is required to create and read chapters (Clerk authentication).
- OnePanel Reader is a web app at https://onepanel.app, not a native app.

## Pages

- [Home](https://onepanel.app/): overview, pricing, and sign-up.
- [Spoiler-free manga reader guide](https://onepanel.app/spoiler-free-manga-reader):
  explains the spoiler problem and how panel-by-panel reading fixes it.
- [FAQ](https://onepanel.app/faq): common questions about pricing, supported
  sources, and how the reader works.
